summary: Completed comprehensive testing of store-timeline endpoint and Stores page temporal tracking feature. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Stores page working correctly with new temporal tracking UI including year selector, store badges, granularity controls (Dia/Semana/Mes), and metric toggle (Dinero/Cantidad). Regression tests passed for Dashboard, Ventas, Productos, Clientes pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height rendering warnings - charts show negative dimensions width(-1) and height(-1) in console
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - cosmetic console warning, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/store-timeline with granularity=month, year=2026 returns correct data structure
Backend: GET /api/store-timeline with granularity=week, year=2025, store=GM209 returns weekly aggregated data
Backend: GET /api/store-timeline with granularity=day, year=2025, store=GM209 returns daily data
Backend: GET /api/store-timeline respects marca filter
Backend: GET /api/store-timeline respects tipo filter
Backend: GET /api/store-timeline with multiple stores returns data for all stores
Backend: Default granularity is month
Backend: GET /api/sales-by-store returns store ranking data
Backend: GET /api/filters returns all filter options including years
Backend: All regression endpoints working (kpis, sales-trend, sales-by-year, sales-by-marca, sales-by-tipo, top-clients, year-monthly)
Frontend: /tiendas page loads with bar chart ranking and ranking table
Frontend: 'Seguimiento Temporal' section visible with year selector badges
Frontend: Store selector badges present and clickable
Frontend: Granularity selector (Dia/Semana/Mes) switches data granularity in chart
Frontend: Metric toggle (Dinero/Cantidad) switches between sales amount and units
Frontend: Timeline line chart displays correctly with multiple store lines
Frontend: Timeline data table shows period rows with Ventas and Uds columns
Frontend: Dashboard page loads correctly with KPIs, charts, and data
Frontend: Navigation between all 5 pages works correctly
Frontend: Global filters (Marca, Tipo, Tienda) present in header
critical_code_review_comments: Chart rendering warnings (width(-1), height(-1)) persist from previous iterations - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All temporal tracking features working correctly

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using real external PostgreSQL database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store-timeline endpoint fully tested with all granularities (day/week/month), filters (marca/tipo/store), and years. Stores.js page has complete temporal tracking UI with year badges, store badges, granularity selector, metric toggle, line chart, and data table. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing. Chart rendering warnings are cosmetic only.
